framework.name: NIST NCCoE Agent Identity & Authorization
framework.description: NIST draft concept paper proposing AI agents be treated as identifiable entities within enterprise IAM systems, using OAuth/OIDC, SPIFFE/SPIRE, SCIM, and NGAC. Focuses on credential lifecycle, least privilege, audit trails, and accountability mapping back to human delegators.
framework.raw_quote: AI agents should be treated as identifiable entities within enterprise identity systems rather than as anonymous automation running under shared credentials.

source.title: NIST concept paper explores identity and authorization controls for ...
